tweet.text: RT @wojespn: Free agent G Lonnie Walker IV has agreed on a one-year deal with the Boston Celtics, his agent George S. Langberg of GSL Sport…

RT @SportsCenter: Lonnie Walker IV posted this in June as an unsigned free agent.
Now he is the newest member of the Boston Celtics 🍿 http…

Turn your negative problems , mindset, into positive energy. Self belief is one of the most important aspects in life. It’s You vs You. Don’t lose yourself in the process of reaching your dreams and goals. Fall in love with the process and everything that’s comes with it 🙏🏾
